currentFocus: v0.3.0 release-readiness review passed locally; next focus is curated commit / PR packaging, not additional feature scope.
projectStatusSummary: Threadsmith v0.3.0 has local release-readiness evidence across tests, build, launchers, self-host smoke, autopilot smoke, deck-route smoke, JSON, and diff hygiene. It is ready for curated PR boundary review, while GitHub release/tag actions remain explicitly gated.

latestAcceptedSlice.title: v0.3.0 release-readiness review / curated PR boundary

topRisks: The worktree contains many accumulated v0.3.0 files, so commit and PR boundaries must be curated carefully.
GitHub CI has not been re-run in this turn; local verification is green.
v0.3.0 still does not promise multi-provider automation or real external skill invocation.
